name: Apple Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 large Cooking apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, blend together 1 1/2 cups flour, yeast, sugar, and salt.
2. Heat water, milk, and butter until very warm. Add to the flour mixture and beat for three minutes. Stir in enough flour by hand to make a soft dough. Cover and let rise for 15 minutes.
3. Pat the dough onto a large oiled pizza pan, forming a rim around the edge. Spread the cheese topping evenly over the crust, then layer the apple topping (see Apple Topping Instructions) on top of the cheese.
4. Mix together the streusel topping ingredients and sprinkle evenly over the apples.
5. Cover the pizza and let rise for an additional 15 minutes.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C), 25-30 minutes, until golden brown.
7. Serve warm or cold.
APPLE TOPPING INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Melt butter in a skillet. Add sliced apples, sugar, flour, and cinnamon. Simmer for 15 minutes, then cool before layering on the crust.
